summary: A Shia Islamic Republic and regional power whose nuclear programme, proxy network (Hezbollah, Hamas, Houthis), and rivalry with Saudi Arabia and Israel make it the most destabilising force in the Middle East — and whose people have repeatedly protested against the theocratic government.

history.detail: Cyrus the Great founds history's first superpower; rules from Egypt to India.
First constitutional government in Asia; limits royal power.
Democratically elected PM Mossadegh overthrown for nationalising oil; Shah restored. CONFIRMED by CIA 2013.
Shah's modernisation programme; alienates clergy — particularly Khomeini.
Shah overthrown; Ayatollah Khomeini returns; theocratic republic established.
444 days; 52 American diplomats held; break in US-Iran relations.
Iraq (with US support) invades; 8-year war kills ~1M; chemical weapons used against Iranians.

history.event: USS Vincennes shoots down Iranian airliner
history.detail: 290 civilians killed; US paid compensation but never apologised. CONFIRMED.
Secret enrichment facilities disclosed; years of IAEA negotiations begin.
Iran limits enrichment for sanctions relief; US, EU, Russia, China co-sign.
Maximum pressure sanctions; Iran resumes enrichment.
US drone strike kills General Qasem Soleimani in Baghdad.
Woman dies in morality police custody; nationwide uprising — 'Woman, Life, Freedom'.

finance.currency_role: Rial (IRR); one of world's most devalued currencies due to sanctions
leverage_tools: Strait of Hormuz (30% of world oil passes through)

tech_startups.vc_ecosystem: Growing domestic ecosystem despite sanctions; isolated from global capital

resources.oil_gas: 4th largest oil reserves, 2nd largest natural gas reserves globally
resources.rare_earths: Significant copper, zinc, chromite, uranium deposits
resources.water: Severe water crisis; Lake Urmia near extinction

follow_the_money.detail: Ghost tankers ship oil to China, India, Venezuela; estimated $40-60B/yr revenue
Revolutionary Guards control construction, telecom, oil — estimated 40% of GDP
Can block 30% of global seaborne oil; existential leverage in any conflict

theories_disputed.detail: CIA and MI6 overthrew democratically elected PM Mossadegh; CIA confirmed in 2013 declassified documents.
IAEA reports enrichment to 84% (weapons-grade: 90%); Iran denies weapons intent; US/Israel say months from capability.

connections.detail: No diplomatic relations since 1980; maximum pressure sanctions; proxy conflicts
Existential conflict; shadow war of assassinations, nuclear sabotage, proxy attacks
Shaheed drones supplied to Russia for Ukraine war
Sunni vs Shia proxy war across Yemen, Iraq, Lebanon, Syria
25-year strategic cooperation deal; main buyer of sanctioned Iranian oil
